sql.query: SELECT CAST(CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM tbl_user_tenant_roles utr INNER JOIN tbl_roles r ON r.id=utr.roleId WHERE utr.tenantId=:tenantId AND utr.userId=:userId AND utr.isActive=1 AND r.roleName='Owner') OR EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM tbl_tasks t INNER JOIN tbl_user_tenant_roles utr ON utr.tenantId=t.tenantId AND utr.userId=:userId2 AND utr.isActive=1 INNER JOIN tbl_team_members tm ON tm.tenantId=t.tenantId AND tm.tenantUserId=utr.id AND tm.teamId=t.assignedToTeamId AND tm.isActive=1 WHERE t.id=:taskId AND t.workflowId=:workflowId AND t.tenantId=:tenantId2) OR EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM tbl_tasks ownTask WHERE ownTask.id=:creatorTaskId AND ownTask.workflowId=:creatorWorkflowId AND ownTask.tenantId=:creatorTenantId AND ownTask.sourceTemplateTaskId IS NULL AND ownTask.createdByUserId=:creatorUserId) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS UNSIGNED) allowed

options.message: Only a member of the assigned team or the tenant Owner can update this task. Unallocated tasks can only be updated by the Owner.

sql.query: SELECT t.id,t.workflowId,t.workflowStageId,t.taskName,t.status,w.workflowName FROM tbl_tasks t INNER JOIN tbl_workflows w ON w.id=t.workflowId AND w.tenantId=t.tenantId WHERE t.id=:taskId AND t.workflowId=:workflowId AND t.tenantId=:tenantId LIMIT 1

SELECT CAST(COUNT(*) AS UNSIGNED) AS blockerCount,GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT p.taskName ORDER BY p.id SEPARATOR ', ') AS blockerNames FROM tbl_tasks t INNER JOIN tbl_task_dependencies d ON d.taskId=t.id AND d.workflowId=t.workflowId AND d.tenantId=t.tenantId INNER JOIN tbl_tasks p ON p.id=d.dependsOnTaskId AND p.workflowId=t.workflowId AND p.tenantId=t.tenantId WHERE t.id=:taskId AND t.workflowId=:workflowId AND t.tenantId=:tenantId AND :requestedStatus NOT IN ('not_started','skipped','cancelled') AND ((d.dependencyType IN ('finish_to_start','blocking') AND p.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled')) OR (d.dependencyType='start_to_start' AND p.status='not_started') OR (d.dependencyType='finish_to_finish' AND :requestedStatus2='complete' AND p.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled')))

options.message: This task cannot change to the requested status until these prerequisite tasks are resolved: {{dependencyCheck[0].blockerNames}}

sql.query: UPDATE tbl_tasks SET status=:status,startedDate=CASE WHEN :status2='in_progress' THEN COALESCE(startedDate,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ELSE startedDate END,completedDate=CASE WHEN :status3='complete' THEN COALESCE(completedDate,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ELSE NULL END,completedByUserId=CASE WHEN :status4='complete' THEN :userId ELSE NULL END,modifiedDate=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id=:id AND workflowId=:workflowId AND tenantId=:tenantId

INSERT INTO tbl_activity_log (tenantId,userId,workflowId,taskId,entityType,entityId,actionType,summary,beforeJson,afterJson,createdDate) SELECT :tenantId,:userId,:workflowId,:taskId,'task',:taskId2,'task.status_changed',CONCAT(:displayName,' changed ',:taskName,' from ',REPLACE(:oldStatus,'_',' '),' to ',REPLACE(:newStatus,'_',' ')),JSON_OBJECT('status',:oldStatus2),JSON_OBJECT('status',:newStatus2),CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM tbl_activity_types at WHERE at.tenantId=:tenantId2 AND at.activityKey='task.status_changed' AND at.isActive=1 AND :oldStatus3<>:newStatus3 LIMIT 1

UPDATE tbl_workflow_stages ws SET ws.status=(SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(t.id)=0 THEN 'not_started' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN t.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)=0 THEN 'complete' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN t.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled') AND t.dueDate<CURRENT_TIMESTAMP THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)>0 THEN 'overdue' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN t.status='external_hold' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)>0 THEN 'external_hold' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN t.status='internal_hold' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)>0 THEN 'internal_hold' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN t.status IN ('in_progress','complete') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)>0 THEN 'in_progress' ELSE 'not_started' END FROM tbl_tasks t WHERE t.workflowStageId=ws.id AND t.tenantId=ws.tenantId),ws.startedDate=CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_tasks t WHERE t.workflowStageId=ws.id AND t.tenantId=ws.tenantId AND t.status IN ('in_progress','complete','internal_hold','external_hold'))>0 THEN COALESCE(ws.startedDate,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ELSE ws.startedDate END,ws.completedDate=CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_tasks t WHERE t.workflowStageId=ws.id AND t.tenantId=ws.tenantId AND t.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled'))=0 THEN COALESCE(ws.completedDate,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ELSE NULL END,ws.modifiedDate=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ws.id=(SELECT x.workflowStageId FROM tbl_tasks x WHERE x.id=:taskId AND x.tenantId=:tenantId) AND ws.tenantId=:tenantId2

UPDATE tbl_workflows w SET w.status=(SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(t.id)=0 THEN 'not_started' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN t.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)=0 THEN 'complete' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN t.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled') AND t.dueDate<CURRENT_TIMESTAMP THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)>0 THEN 'overdue' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN t.status='external_hold' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)>0 THEN 'external_hold' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN t.status='internal_hold' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)>0 THEN 'internal_hold' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN t.status IN ('in_progress','complete') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)>0 THEN 'in_progress' ELSE 'not_started' END FROM tbl_tasks t WHERE t.workflowId=w.id AND t.tenantId=w.tenantId),w.completedDate=CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_tasks t WHERE t.workflowId=w.id AND t.tenantId=w.tenantId AND t.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled'))=0 THEN COALESCE(w.completedDate,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ELSE NULL END,w.currentStageId=(SELECT ws.id FROM tbl_workflow_stages ws WHERE ws.workflowId=w.id AND ws.tenantId=w.tenantId AND ws.status<>'complete' ORDER BY ws.sortOrder,ws.id LIMIT 1),w.modifiedDate=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE w.id=:workflowId AND w.tenantId=:tenantId
